name: SAP Fieldglass Audit Trail API Examples
description: Request examples for the SAP Fieldglass Audit Trail API

examples.description: Returns audit trail details. When using this with query parameter pairs for start and stop times, you can limit the results to a particular timeframe.

parameters.name: Authorization
parameters.description: Only required for production access when using SAP Fieldglass.

parameters.name: X-ApplicationKey
parameters.description: The company-specific key provided by SAP Fieldglass for API access. This is required for production access.

parameters.name: Content-Type
parameters.description: This value is required in production and must be application/x-www-form-urlencoded.

parameters.name: PriorStartTime
parameters.description: Start time of the integration. Pair this with PriorStopTime.

parameters.name: CurrentStartTime
parameters.description: Start time of the integration. Pair this with CurrentStopTime.

parameters.name: PriorStopTime
parameters.description: Stop time of the integration. Pair this with PriorStartTime.

parameters.name: CurrentStopTime
parameters.description: Stop time of the integration. Pair this with CurrentStartTime.

parameters.name: Status
parameters.description: Error / OK status tied to the integration process to be filtered on.
